class.name: IRCChannel
class.brief_description: Represents an IRC channel and its state.
class.description: A data container that stores information about an active IRC channel, including its name, topic, and the users currently present in the channel along with their privileges and modes.

method.name: add_user
method.description: Adds a user to the internal channel tracker with the specified modes. [param nick] represents the user's nickname, and [param modes] determines their privileges (e.g., '+o').

method.name: get_user_modes
method.description: Returns a string representing the modes (e.g., 'o', 'v') of the specified user in the channel. [param nick] is the user's nickname.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns an array of all nicknames currently present in the channel.

method.name: has_user
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified nickname resides within the channel tracking list. [param nick] is the user's nickname.

method.name: is_user_operator
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user possesses operator privileges ('o'/'@') within the channel. [param nick] is the user's nickname.

method.name: is_user_voiced
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user possesses voice privileges ('v'/'+') within the channel. [param nick] is the user's nickname.

method.name: remove_user
method.description: Removes a user from the channel tracking list. [param nick] is the user's nickname.

method.name: set_user_modes
method.description: Sets the mode tracking strings for a specific user in the channel. [param nick] is the user's nickname, and [param modes] specifies the target modes.

members.member: String representing the active channel modes.
Nickname of the user who last set the channel topic.
Unix timestamp indicating when the topic was last set.
